channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Is Christopher Nolan's Odysseus Too Soft?
item.description: Nolan updates the Greek hero for modern viewers, but critics question what alternative he had.

item.title: Don't Give Up on Jimmy Lai
item.description: Pastor Ezra Jin's release is a reason to celebrate, but the U.S. shouldn't rest until Lai is freed.

item.title: The Fog of Hype
item.description: Clearing away the conservative obsession with Christopher Nolan.

item.title: Trump expected to deliver remarks at rescheduled correspondents' dinner
item.description: President Trump is expected to reappear at the rescheduled White House Correspondents' Association Dinner on Friday, almost three months after a gunma...
